Sql.TotalVisits: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ?
Sql.UniquePatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ?
Sql.ChronicFollowups: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucode, v.visitno) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]')
Sql.NcdDmPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]'
Sql.NcdHtPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]'
Sql.NcdDmHtPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]')
Sql.NcdBpScreened: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (NULLIF(TRIM(v.pressure), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(v.pressure2), '') IS NOT NULL)
Sql.NcdFbsScreened: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT x.pid) FROM (SELECT CAST(s.pid AS CHAR) AS pid FROM ncd_person_ncd_screen s WHERE s.screen_date = ? AND s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 UNION SELECT CAST(l.pid AS CHAR) AS pid FROM ncdlab l WHERE l.date_serv = DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y%m%d') AND (l.testname LIKE '%FBS%' OR l.testname LIKE '%FAST%' OR l.testname LIKE '%SUGAR%' OR l.labstdcode IN ('0531101', '0531102'))) x
Sql.MissingDiagnosis: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit v LEFT JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.visitno IS NULL
Sql.AncVisits: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitanc a WHERE a.datecheck = ?
Sql.VaccineVisits: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitepi e WHERE e.dateepi = ?
Sql.HomeVisits: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.pcucode, h.visitno) FROM visithomehealthindividual h JOIN visit v ON v.pcucode = h.pcucode AND v.visitno = h.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ?
Sql.ReferOut: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitrefer r WHERE DATE(r.datetimerefer) = ?
Sql.EmergencyCases: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND v.typein = '4'
Sql.NcdHouseLocations: SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(v.pcucodeperson, ':', v.pid) AS patient_key, CASE WHEN d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' THEN 'DM' WHEN d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]' THEN 'HT' ELSE 'NCD' END AS disease_group, CAST(TRIM(h.ygis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) AS latitude, CAST(TRIM(h.xgis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) AS longitude FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno JOIN person p ON p.pcucodeperson = v.pcucodeperson AND p.pid = v.pid JOIN house h ON h.pcucode = p.pcucodeperson AND h.hcode = p.hcode WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]') AND TRIM(h.ygis) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND TRIM(h.xgis) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(TRIM(h.ygis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) BETWEEN 5 AND 21 AND CAST(TRIM(h.xgis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) BETWEEN 97 AND 106
